name: Rogz Dog Treat Gumz Ball 4.9cm Lime Small (Gu01-L)
shortDescription: Rogz Gumz Ball is a bounce and fetch nibble toy for added fun and reward. Soft enough to be gentle on your dog’s teeth, firm enough to bounce and floats in water. Fill the reward cavity with your dog's favorite to keep them engaged!
description: Gumz dog ball is easy to bounce, easy to fetch, easy to carry and easy to love! And all dog parents know balls have always been a huge hit amongst dogs - so upgrade that celebrated experience with a treat filled Gumz ball from Rogz. Playtime has never tasted this good! Benefits your dog's mental & physical health Bone-shaped hole to fill with your dog?s favourite treat Easy to bounce & for your dog to fetch and carry Durable exterior for the chewer in your home Size: Small 4.9cm
